code_file_inventory_upsert_repository.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS root_path, %s::text AS repo_name, %s::text AS repo_key, %s::jsonb AS metadata_json, %s::jsonb AS sync_include_roots_json, %s::jsonb AS sync_exclude_patterns_json) INSERT INTO inventory.code_repositories (code_repository_id, repo_key, root_path, name, primary_language, metadata_json, sync_include_roots_json, sync_exclude_patterns_json) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT code_repository_id FROM inventory.code_repositories WHERE root_path = input.root_path), md5(input.root_path)::uuid), input.repo_key, input.root_path, input.repo_name, NULL, input.metadata_json, input.sync_include_roots_json, input.sync_exclude_patterns_json FROM input ON CONFLICT (root_path) DO UPDATE SET repo_key = EXCLUDED.repo_key, name = EXCLUDED.name, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, sync_include_roots_json = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.sync_include_roots_json, inventory.code_repositories.sync_include_roots_json), sync_exclude_patterns_json = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.sync_exclude_patterns_json, inventory.code_repositories.sync_exclude_patterns_json), last_scanned_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING code_repository_id
code_file_inventory_upsert_repository.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @root_path nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @repo_name nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @repo_key nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @metadata_json nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @sync_include_roots_json nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @sync_exclude_patterns_json nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with MERGE when enabled. */

code_file_inventory_load_repository_sync.postgresqlSql: SELECT sync_include_roots_json, sync_exclude_patterns_json FROM inventory.code_repositories WHERE code_repository_id = %s LIMIT 1
code_file_inventory_load_repository_sync.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) sync_include_roots_json, sync_exclude_patterns_json FROM inventory.code_repositories WHERE code_repository_id = ?

code_file_inventory_fetch_existing_file_.postgresqlSql: SELECT file_path, code_file_id, sha256 FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = %s
code_file_inventory_fetch_existing_file_.sqlServerSql: SELECT file_path, code_file_id, sha256 FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = ?

code_file_inventory_fetch_existing_file_.postgresqlSql: SELECT file_path, code_file_id, code_repository_id FROM inventory.code_files
code_file_inventory_fetch_existing_file_.sqlServerSql: SELECT file_path, code_file_id, code_repository_id FROM inventory.code_files

code_file_inventory_batch_update_changed.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS x(line_count integer, sha256 text, content_text text, metadata_json jsonb, code_file_id uuid)) UPDATE inventory.code_files AS target SET line_count = rows.line_count, sha256 = rows.sha256, content_text = rows.content_text, metadata_json = rows.metadata_json, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM rows WHERE target.code_file_id = rows.code_file_id RETURNING target.code_file_id
code_file_inventory_batch_update_changed.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @rows nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

code_file_inventory_batch_insert_missing.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS x(code_file_id uuid, code_repository_id uuid, code_project_id uuid, file_path text, relative_path text, language text, extension text, line_count integer, sha256 text, content_text text, symbol_count integer, metadata_json jsonb)) INSERT INTO inventory.code_files (code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, content_text, symbol_count, metadata_json) SELECT code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, content_text, symbol_count, metadata_json FROM rows RETURNING code_file_id
code_file_inventory_batch_insert_missing.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @rows nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

code_file_inventory_batch_rehome_existin.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS x(code_repository_id uuid, code_project_id uuid, relative_path text, language text, extension text, line_count integer, sha256 text, content_text text, metadata_json jsonb, code_file_id uuid)) UPDATE inventory.code_files AS target SET code_repository_id = rows.code_repository_id, code_project_id = rows.code_project_id, relative_path = rows.relative_path, language = rows.language, extension = rows.extension, line_count = rows.line_count, sha256 = rows.sha256, content_text = rows.content_text, metadata_json = rows.metadata_json, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM rows WHERE target.code_file_id = rows.code_file_id RETURNING target.code_file_id
code_file_inventory_batch_rehome_existin.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @rows nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

code_file_inventory_delete_stale_code_fi.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::uuid AS code_repository_id, %s::jsonb AS stale_paths_json), stale_paths AS (SELECT value AS file_path FROM input, jsonb_array_elements_text(input.stale_paths_json) AS value), stale_files AS (SELECT f.code_file_id FROM inventory.code_files f JOIN input ON input.code_repository_id = f.code_repository_id JOIN stale_paths ON stale_paths.file_path = f.file_path), stale_symbols AS (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_workflow_links AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.workflow_run_code_files WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_object_flows_file AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_object_flows_symbol AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), delete_shape_file AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_shape_symbol AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), null_source_relationships AS (UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET source_symbol_id = NULL WHERE source_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), null_target_relationships AS (UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET target_symbol_id = NULL WHERE target_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), delete_relationships AS (DELETE FROM inventory.code_relationships WHERE source_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files) OR target_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_symbols AS (DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), delete_files AS (DELETE FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files) RETURNING code_file_id) SELECT code_file_id FROM delete_files
code_file_inventory_delete_stale_code_fi.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @code_repository_id uniqueidentifier = ?; DECLARE @stale_paths nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

code_file_inventory_delete_stale_files.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::uuid AS code_repository_id, %s::jsonb AS stale_paths_json), stale_paths AS (SELECT value AS file_path FROM input, jsonb_array_elements_text(input.stale_paths_json) AS value), stale_files AS (SELECT f.code_file_id FROM inventory.code_files f JOIN input ON input.code_repository_id = f.code_repository_id JOIN stale_paths ON stale_paths.file_path = f.file_path), stale_symbols AS (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_workflow_links AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.workflow_run_code_files WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_object_flows_file AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_object_flows_symbol AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), delete_shape_file AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_shape_symbol AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), null_source_relationships AS (UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET source_symbol_id = NULL WHERE source_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), null_target_relationships AS (UPDATE inventory.code_relationships SET target_symbol_id = NULL WHERE target_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), delete_relationships AS (DELETE FROM inventory.code_relationships WHERE source_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files) OR target_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files)), delete_symbols AS (DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_symbol_id IN (SELECT code_symbol_id FROM stale_symbols)), delete_files AS (DELETE FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM stale_files) RETURNING code_file_id) SELECT code_file_id FROM delete_files
code_file_inventory_delete_stale_files.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @code_repository_id uniqueidentifier = ?; DECLARE @stale_paths nvarchar(max) = ?; /* compatibility alias for code_file_inventory_delete_stale_code_files */

code_file_inventory_delete_orphaned_code.postgresqlSql: WITH orphaned AS (SELECT repo.code_repository_id FROM inventory.code_repositories AS repo LEFT JOIN inventory.code_files AS file_row ON file_row.code_repository_id = repo.code_repository_id LEFT JOIN decisioning.codebase_shape_findings AS finding ON finding.code_repository_id = repo.code_repository_id GROUP BY repo.code_repository_id HAVING COUNT(file_row.code_file_id) = 0 AND COUNT(finding.codebase_shape_finding_id) = 0) DELETE FROM inventory.code_repositories WHERE code_repository_id IN (SELECT code_repository_id FROM orphaned) RETURNING code_repository_id
code_file_inventory_delete_orphaned_code.sqlServerSql: DELETE FROM inventory.code_repositories WHERE code_repository_id IN (SELECT repo.code_repository_id FROM inventory.code_repositories AS repo LEFT JOIN inventory.code_files AS file_row ON file_row.code_repository_id = repo.code_repository_id LEFT JOIN decisioning.codebase_shape_findings AS finding ON finding.code_repository_id = repo.code_repository_id GROUP BY repo.code_repository_id HAVING COUNT(file_row.code_file_id) = 0 AND COUNT(finding.codebase_shape_finding_id) = 0)
